stemHtml: After your MAYDAY to Bern Radar (already acknowledged), you hear: "All stations, stop transmitting, MAYDAY". As the aircraft in distress, what should you do?

options.a: Stop until all other aircraft leave the frequency.
options.b: Only continue if the situation worsens.
options.c: Stop transmitting until you hear "Distress traffic ended".
options.d: Continue communicating with Bern Radar with updates on your situation.
